odbc-desc: Provides ODBC database connectivity and query capabilities for MediaWiki, with standalone parser functions and External Data extension integration.
odbc-error-unknown-source: ODBC error: Unknown data source "$1". Check $wgODBCSources in LocalSettings.php.
odbc-error-connect-failed: ODBC error: Could not connect to source "$1": $2
odbc-error-config-invalid: ODBC error: Source "$1" has invalid configuration — missing required field(s): $2.
odbc-error-arbitrary-not-allowed: ODBC error: Arbitrary SQL queries are not allowed. Use prepared statements, or set $wgODBCAllowArbitraryQueries = true.
odbc-error-no-source: ODBC error: No data source specified. Use source= or db= parameter.
odbc-error-no-from: ODBC error: No table specified. Use from= parameter.
odbc-error-no-template: ODBC error: No template specified. Use template= parameter.
odbc-error-no-prepared: ODBC error: No prepared statements configured for source "$1".
odbc-error-prepared-not-found: ODBC error: Prepared statement "$1" not found for source "$2".
odbc-error-prepare-failed: ODBC error: Failed to prepare statement: $1
odbc-error-execute-failed: ODBC error: Failed to execute statement: $1
odbc-error-illegal-input: ODBC error: Illegal SQL pattern "$1" found in parameter "$2".
odbc-error-permission: ODBC error: You do not have permission to execute ODBC queries.
odbc-error-too-many-queries: ODBC error: Per-page query limit reached ($1 {{PLURAL:$1|query|queries}} allowed). Reduce the number of {{#odbc_query:}} calls on this page, or raise $wgODBCMaxQueriesPerPage in LocalSettings.php.
odbc-error-admin-select-only: ODBC error: Only SELECT queries are allowed from the admin interface.
odbc-error-identifier-too-long: ODBC error: Identifier in "$1" is too long (max 128 characters).
odbc-error-invalid-identifier: ODBC error: Invalid identifier "$1" in "$2". Only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and dots are allowed.
odbc-error-having-without-groupby: ODBC error: A HAVING clause requires a GROUP BY clause. Add group by= to your {{#odbc_query:}} call.
odbc-ed-error-illegal: ODBC connector error: Illegal SQL pattern "$1" found in "$2" parameter.
odbc-error-invalid-token: ODBC error: Invalid security token. Please try again.
odbc-admin-desc: Test connections, browse tables, and run test queries against configured ODBC data sources.
odbc-admin-intro: The following ODBC data sources are configured in $wgODBCSources:
odbc-admin-no-sources: No ODBC data sources are configured. Add entries to $wgODBCSources in LocalSettings.php.
odbc-admin-no-tables: No tables found (or no permission to list tables).
odbc-admin-no-columns: No columns found for this table.
odbc-admin-query-intro: Enter a SQL query to execute against this data source (max 100 rows returned):
